title: Blocky 3D Ladder
description: 3D models to replace the paper-thin ladders.
body:
## Blocky Ladders

This resource pack gives ladders a bit more weight while retaining the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft. The ladder has been connected to the walls behind them, while the rungs have been confined to the rails to provide a model that looks clean and unobtrusive from all angles.

_For the full blocky collection, try [Blocky Replacements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-replacements)._

### <u>Includes:</u>
☑ Proper texture-culling\
☑ No additional textures\
☑ No stretched textures\
☑ No texture fighting/z-fighting

## Showcase
![Showcase of Blocky Ladder at the bottom of a pit with ladders leading upward](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HN1XckCY/images/1e4884c17bb97601a652f3402c2227367d03802c.png)
